description: Today, we honor Odisha Day, celebrating the rich culture and heritage of Odisha, India. Chip Dippers are made to evoke this spirit, offering a burst of Masala flavor that embodies the vibrant essence of Odisha's cuisine.
Today marks National Peanut Butter and Jelly Day, and we honor this with Lily's Peanut Butter chip. A delightful blend of creamy peanut butter flavor perfectly paired for your culinary celebration.
event_name: National Peanut Butter and Jelly Day

description: Korean Bbq Bulgogi chip today reflects an era of law enforcement action.
event_name: 2008 – Texas law enforcement cordons off the FLDS's YFZ Ranch. Eventually 533 women and children will be taken into state custody.
